lines: DOEON KIM

SUMMARY
Builds production-minded AI systems with strongest public proof in tool-calling reliability, multimodal incident workflows, and reviewable runtime design.

Improved StagePilot benchmark success from 29.17% baseline to 87.50% with parser recovery and to 100.00% with bounded retry, then exposed the same runtime story through live review, trace observability, and regression-gate surfaces.
Extends the same reliability posture into bounded live reviewer APIs for incident review, governed analytics, document QA, air-gapped operations, and high-trust workflow delivery.

Cloud / Data: GCP, Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Search, AWS, Databricks, Snowflake, Palantir
Ops / Safety: incident response, IAM/RBAC, audit logging, replayability, fallback design, governance controls
